## Verification

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Security and Operations Notes

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, database dumps, or credential-bearing logs are included.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for user-facing or operator-facing changes.
- [ ] Key, provider, LiteLLM, or usage changes include tests or smoke-test notes.
